create_enchantment_industry.ponder.blaze: Introduction to Blaze Enchanter
This is a Blaze Enchanter, which functions like an Enchanting Table
Pass in Liquid Experience to get it started
Before you can start enchanting with it, you need to set the enchant level via the panel. The level cap of a vanilla enchanting table is 30.
The panel is also a filter slot. Right click that slot with an item to set the item as a template item. This is Template Enchanting Mode
In Template Enchanting Mode, Blaze Enchanter can enchant Enchanting Template and will only generate enchantments that can appear on template item
Super Enchant Time!
You may have noticed that the Blaze Enchanter has two "stomachs". Try feeding him some Cake o' Enchanting?
Wow IT's SEETHING!
Now it's ready to do something truly remarkable! The enchant level cap is significantly increased! Treasure enchantments will be available!
Trust me, you're gonna need this
Super Enchanting can cause lightning strikes
You can cover the Blaze Enchanter with block to avoid lightning strikes, but then curse may appear
You don't want to do anything? Fine
Introduction to Blaze Forger
This is a Blaze Forger, which functions like an Anvil
Pass in Liquid Experience to get it started
Blaze Forger can merge enchantments of the same item like an anvil
Blaze Forger can also merge Enchanting Templates, and there is no "repair cost"
Most importantly, Blaze Forger is able to apply Enchanting Templates to items!
Also, Blaze Forger is able to strip enchantment from equipment, book or Enchanting Template to a blank Enchanting Template!
Super Enchant Time!
You may have noticed that the Blaze Forger has two "stomachs". Try feeding him some Cake o' Enchanting?
Look! SEETHING BLAZE!
Now it's ready to do something truly fascinating! Your merging can break the enchantment level cap! Conflicting enchantments can be merged together!
Oh, as a side note, Super Enchanting Templates require this state to be applied and processed
Don't forget to place a lighting rod. You'll need it
Super Enchanting can cause lightning strikes
You can cover the Blaze Forger with block to avoid lightning strikes, but then "repair cost" may appear
You don't want to do anything? Emmmm okay...
create_enchantment_industry.ponder.exper: Things you might want to know
You need to know a few more things before you're ready to start working on enchantments
Block of Experience is no longer purely decorative and storage block. You'll need it later
This is Block of Super Experience. You'll need it for Super Enchanting
Blaze Enchanter
Blaze Forger
Super Enchanting allows you to break the limit!
Introduction to Experience Handling
This is a tank of Liquid Experience, and it will be your most used form of experience
If you need to refill Liquid Experience into a container item, use spout
Don't worry, leaked Liquid Experience will turn into experience orbs
To convert the Experience you carry to liquid form, you will need two components
Liquid Hatch for accessing liquids directly from items
Experience Hatch for accessing experience directly from the player.
But as part of Create, automation is a must, right?
You can use Item Drain to pour Liquid Experience out of items
You can also use Mechanical GrindStone to pulverize items like Experience Nuggets into Liquid Experience
Crushing Wheel now has a new mechanism: It has a chance of dropping a very small amount of experience nugget when it kills a creature.
Deployer also has a new mechanism: When mob is killed by deployer, experience nuggets are dropped
Prepare materials for Super Enchant
First, you need to make Block of Super Experience, which will be used to make the Super Enchanting Template.This requires the use of Block of Experience.
Lighting Strike!
Second, you need to make Cake o' Enchanting. Blaze will love eating this
Introduction to Experience Hatch
It is very simple to use. Right click Hatch to store Experience...
...Shift-Right-Click Hatch to extract stored Experience
There are a filter slot and a scroll panel on Hatch. You can configure how much Experience per interaction on the panel
The filter slot is used to deal with experience fluids of other mods
Let's assume that Liquid Cyan Dye is experience fluid from another mod...
...And place Bucket Cyan Dye in filter slot
Now, you can directly save and extract your experience as 'The Cyan Experience'!
create_enchantment_industry.ponder.mecha: Mechanical Grindstone not only has all the features of a grindstone...
...but it also has the features of sandpaper.
You can use Mechanical Grindstone with item in your hand. 100% safe and won't hurt your hands :D
To use Mechanical Grindstone, you need an Item Drain.
This is a Grindstone Drain. You will need another Mechanical Grindstone to use with it
Experience in item form can be crushed into liquid form by Mechanical Grindstone
create_enchantment_industry.ponder.print: Before you can put it to use, you need to set what you want to print via the filter slot...
DO NOT FORGET TO CHECK PRINTING RECIPE!
